rules: Valuta sulla base di come il testo trasmette saturazione sensoriale uditiva o la sua assenza
RUMORE evoca accumulo, interferenza, pressione uditiva, incapacità di isolarsi; SILENZIO evoca vuoto uditivo, presenza densa, attesa
Distingui effetto semantico (atmosfera, ritmo del testo stesso) da lessicale (parole dirette)
Un punteggio 5 richiede che la qualità uditiva del contesto emerga senza essere nominata
prompt_trace: Describe the experience of being in a city at an unusual hour.
Write about what happens in a room when everyone has left.
Describe the sensation of waking up in an unfamiliar place.
Write about an object that announces itself before you see it.
Describe the experience of waiting for something that does not come.
Write about what a space feels like when it is completely still.
Describe the sensation of being in a crowd that is moving in one direction.
Write about the quality of a moment just after something ends.
Describe what it is like to concentrate in a place not designed for it.
Write about the experience of hearing something you cannot identify.
Describe a room that absorbs everything that enters it.
Write about a threshold between two different kinds of space.
